businessQuestion: What are the top reasons for stockout events across all stores?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    RC.ROOT_CAUSE,
    COUNT(*) AS STOCKOUT_EVENTS,
    SUM(SE.LOST_REVENUE_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_REVENUE,
    SUM(SE.LOST_MARGIN_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_MARGIN
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT SE
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_ROOT_CAUSE RC
    ON SE.ROOT_CAUSE_KEY = RC.ROOT_CAUSE_KEY
GROUP BY RC.ROOT_CAUSE
ORDER BY LOST_REVENUE DESC;
businessContext: Operations leaders want to understand the operational causes of stockouts and prioritize corrective actions.
